tasks.label: Build Debug
tasks.command: GEN=ninja BUILD_BENCHMARK=1 BUILD_TPCH=1 BUILD_TPCDS=1 BUILD_HTTPFS=1 CORE_EXTENSIONS='tpch' make debug -j 7

tasks.label: Build Release
tasks.command: GEN=ninja BUILD_BENCHMARK=1 BUILD_TPCH=1 BUILD_TPCDS=1 BUILD_HTTPFS=1 CORE_EXTENSIONS='tpch' make release -j 7
